---
title: "Report back from COAR's annual meeting: celebrating a $4 million grant for the Notify Project"
date: 2022-05-24
description: "Recap of the COAR annual meeting in Madrid, the first in-person gathering after a significant pause, highlighting a $4 million grant for the Notify Project."
categories: [Scholarly Communication, Events]
---

*Content to be migrated from [pandelisperakakis.info](https://pandelisperakakis.info/2022/05/24/report-back-from-coars-annual-meeting-celebrating-a-4-million-grant-for-the-notify-project/).*

<!-- Paste the full post content here -->
